description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json directly (keyless demo: the stub IS the 'agent'). Rewrites name to kebab-case and replaces description with a substantive (>=20 char) explanation. JsonSchemaGate goes green on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read output.json and schema.json. name is "My Cool Skill", which violates the kebab-case pattern (spaces, uppercase). description is "does stuff", which is under the 20-char minimum. Rewriting name to "my-cool-skill" and description to a real, substantive explanation. allowed_tools already conforms, left untouched. Not editing schema.json.
interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
